name: simba-seed
description: Hand-curated recall benchmark over simba's own domain. Built to be HARD for dense recall: tight clusters that share a salient entity but differ in the fact (peewee*, threshold numbers, the six hooks), adversarial keyword-overlap distractors, and a few broad/multi-relevant aggregation cases. A perfect score here would mean the dataset is too easy, not that recall is solved.

corpus.content: gh pr create fails 'must be a collaborator' when the active gh account is rd-cto-kira; switch to mahmoudimus first
A stale GITHUB_TOKEN env var makes gh return 401; prefix gh commands with env -u GITHUB_TOKEN to ignore it
peewee binds models to the Database at class-definition time; per-cwd connections need the connect(cwd) context and dropping conn params
peewee core lacks FTS5; also vendor playhouse/sqlite_ext.py for the memory_fts and kg_edges_fts virtual tables
peewee is vendored under src/simba/_vendor at commit 9bd107f; pyproject extend-exclude keeps ruff off the vendored code
peewee raises IntegrityError on a UNIQUE violation; job-claim tables rely on that to make claim() idempotent
the duplicate-detection cosine threshold is 0.92; a new memory at or above it is treated as a duplicate of the existing one
the recall cosine floor is 0.35 for precise queries and 0.28 for broad queries (min_similarity / min_similarity_broad)
Reciprocal Rank Fusion uses rrf_k=60 to dampen low-ranked items when fusing the vector and keyword arms
memory content is capped at 200 characters; longer detail goes in the context field instead
the supersession band is [0.85, 0.92): a same-type memory in that range replaces the old one instead of being stored as a duplicate
hybrid recall fuses a dense vector arm and a sparse bm25 keyword arm via Reciprocal Rank Fusion, defaulting to vector-only if the keyword arm fails
the intent-aware cosine floor is a near no-op on a dense corpus; the real broad-query lever is widening max_results and fts_candidate_pool
focus_terms cuts bm25 noise 80-90% on long thinking blocks by feeding only high-signal entity terms to the keyword arm
multi-arm HyDE adds a 2nd vector arm over the focused-term string; opt-in via expansion_enabled because it costs an extra embed
the PreCompact hook exports each session's full transcript to ~/.claude/transcripts/{sessionId}/ for later learning extraction
the SessionStart hook auto-starts the memory daemon, polling up to 15 times at 300ms intervals before giving up
the UserPromptSubmit hook recalls memories for the prompt and reinforces the SIMBA:core rules
the PreToolUse hook injects knowledge-graph context derived from the agent's thinking before a tool runs
episodic consolidation rolls a whole session's memories into one EPISODE via the RLM engine, deduped by the episode_jobs table
a session is eligible for an episode only once it has >= episodes.min_memories memories and no EPISODE yet, so consolidation never races the digest
the bitemporal knowledge graph separates occurred_at (event time) from valid_from/valid_to (belief time)
kg_query is a single-hop bm25 join over kg_edges; there is no multi-hop traversal or pagerank over the graph
RLM treats the full transcript as external data the agent navigates with grep/peek/window, recursing into only the relevant slices
the RLM autonomous engine is opt-in (rlm.engine=claude-cli) and spawns a detached cheap claude -p, never Opus, to digest a transcript
stacked PRs squash-merged into an intermediate base branch lose their code when that branch is deleted; never stack with squash-merge
simba embeds locally with the nomic-embed-text-v1.5 Q4_K_M GGUF model (768-dim) via llama-cpp-python; prefixes search_document/search_query
every configurable value is a field on a @configurable dataclass, gettable/settable via simba config get/set <section>.<key>; no env-var-only config

cases.query: gh pr create says I must be a collaborator
gh keeps returning 401 unauthorized
why does peewee break per-connection cwd binding
how do I get full-text search working with the peewee ORM
which commit is the peewee library pinned to
how is the job-claim table made idempotent
what cosine value counts as a duplicate memory
what is the minimum similarity floor for recall
what constant does reciprocal rank fusion use
when does storing a memory replace the old one instead of deduping
broad queries need more results not a lower similarity floor
where does the transcript get written when a session compacts
how long does the daemon wait on startup before giving up
consolidate a coding session into one episode memory
event time versus belief time in the knowledge graph
does the knowledge graph support multi-hop traversal
do not stack squash-merge pull requests
what embedding model does simba use
tell me everything about how the peewee ORM is used
summarize all the numeric thresholds and limits in the memory system
what do the claude code hooks do
how does the keyword arm avoid matching everything
